mapper.sql: id, job_name, cron_expression, enabled, description, last_execute_time, last_execute_result, create_time, modify_time, creator, modifier, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM scheduler_configs WHERE job_name = #{jobName} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM scheduler_configs WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT
FROM scheduler_configs WHERE deleted = 0
AND job_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobName}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE scheduler_configs SET last_execute_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_execute_result = #{result} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scheduler_configs ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',
-- 业务字段 job_name VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '任务名称', cron_expression VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Cron表达式', enabled TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '是否启用：0-禁用，1-启用', description VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '任务描述', last_execute_time TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后执行时间', last_execute_result VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后执行结果：SUCCESS-成功，FAILED-失败',
-- 标准字段 create_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', modify_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '修改时间', creator VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '创建人', modifier VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '修改人', deleted TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '逻辑删除：0-未删除，1-已删除',
-- 索引 UNIQUE KEY uk_job_name (job_name) COMMENT '任务名称唯一索引', INDEX idx_enabled (enabled) COMMENT '启用状态索引', INDEX idx_create_time (create_time) COMMENT '创建时间索引', INDEX idx_modify_time (modify_time) COMMENT '修改时间索引' ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='定时任务配置表'
